revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Tina Green | Guid=3005-58725 | Deck=Dr. Green was saved by Spider-Man during an attack with the Free Radicals. Later, she helped Spidey to stop the chaos across New York City due to the Lizard's actions. | Concepts=Concepts/Scientist_5852 | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends= | Games=Games/The_Amazing_Spider_Man_2013 | Locations=Locations/Oscorp | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3818057-5417195030-latest.jpg }}

Later, she helped Spidey to stop the chaos across New York City due to the Lizard's actions.

revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Toxic | Guid=3005-58848 | Deck=A mean-spirited and obnoxious supervillain with the power to turn his body acidic, as well as having flight and enhanced endurance and strength. Unfortunately, this transformation also leaves him nude. | Concepts=Concepts/Flight,Concepts/Henchman,Concepts/Lawbreaking,Concepts/Nudity,Concepts/Poison,Concepts/Sadism,Concepts/Super_Strength,Concepts/Supervillain | Enemies=Characters/Invisigal,Characters/Robert_Robertson_III | Franchises= | Friends=Characters/Armstrong,Characters/Shroud_58847 | Games=Games/Dispatch | Locations=Locations/California | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3828164-toxic.jpg }}

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Vincent | Guid=3005-6300 | Deck=Vincent is a priest within Silent Hill's main cult and has accompanied Claudia Wolf in her quest to rebirth God. Eventually he rejects Claudia's vision and attempts to join Heather Mason's side. | Gender=Male | Concepts=Concepts/Betrayal,Concepts/Cult_Leader,Concepts/Cults,Concepts/Desperation_Move,Concepts/Evil_Organization,Concepts/Fate,Concepts/Good_vs_Evil,Concepts/Mysterious_Ally,Concepts/Priest,Concepts/Religion,Concepts/Revive | Enemies=Characters/Claudia_Wolf | Franchises=Franchises/Silent_Hill | Friends=Characters/Claudia_Wolf,Characters/Douglas_Cartland,Characters/Heather_Mason | Games=Games/Silent_Hill_3,Games/Silent_Hill_Experience,Games/Silent_Hill_HD_Collection | Locations=Locations/Church,Locations/Silent_Hill | People=People/Clifford_Rippel,People/Yuri_Lowenthal | Objects=Objects/Book,Objects/Glasses | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/9/96986/1781894-vincentfull.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"1781894-vincentfull.png","path":"9\/96986\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_tiny,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,square_small,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini,scale_large,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":""},"background":[]}' /> Vincent first appear when he urges Heather to go to Leonard Wolf and retrieve the Seal of Metatron which he mistakenly believes will repel God. He gives Heather a book that provides information.
When he is being questioned whose side is he on, Vincent tells Heather that he is on her side. She asks him why is he helping her and Vincent replies that he doesn't feel like stopping God's birth. In the end, Heather finds Vincent arguing with Claudia. He orders the former to kill the latter. However, Claudia stabs him in the back. Vincent tells Heather to use the Seal of Metatron, but it didn't work. Claudia stabs Vincent in the chest, finally killing him.
When examining Vincent's body, Heather says that she may hated him, but doesn't deserve that fate.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Virginia | Guid=3005-52559 | Deck=Niece of Queen Ilenia (who she looks almost identical to), and older cousin of Alain. Found sanctuary in Drakenhold after Cornia fell. | Concepts= | Enemies=Characters/Galerius | Franchises= | Friends=Characters/Alain | Games=Games/Unicorn_Overlord | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3558678-screenshot2024-03-19093327.png }}

Found sanctuary in Drakenhold after Cornia fell.

{{Character | Name=Volan Das | Guid=3005-58518 | Deck=A Separatist allied bounty hunter who operated a modified Droid Trilogy-fighter. | Concepts= | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends= | Games= | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/45/456753/3797132-image.png }}

{{Character | Name=Vulko | Guid=3005-58751 | Deck=A Romani man traveling through Transylvania with his daughter, Esmeralda. They befriend the Ninja Turtles, but he is secretly a werewolf who becomes under the thrall of Savanti Romero in that form. | Concepts=Concepts/Gypsies,Concepts/Romani,Concepts/Werewolf | Enemies=Characters/Donatello,Characters/Leonardo,Characters/Michelangelo,Characters/Raphael,Characters/Savanti_Romero | Franchises= | Friends=Characters/Donatello,Characters/Leonardo,Characters/Michelangelo,Characters/Raphael,Characters/Savanti_Romero | Games=Games/Teenage_Mutant_Ninja_Turtles_Monsters_vs_Mutants | Locations=Locations/Transylvania | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3818696-tmnt515_29.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3818696-tmnt515_29.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_small,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini,scale_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A Romani man traveling through Transylvania with his daughter, Esmeralda. They befriend the Ninja Turtles, but he is secretly a werewolf who becomes under the thrall of Savanti Romero in that form.

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Character | Name=Waterboy | Guid=3005-58773 | Deck=A timid and socially awkward would-be Superhero whose power is spitting out torrents of water. Works at the Superhero Dispatch Network as a janitor, but can be allowed to join the Z-Team. | Concepts= | Enemies=Characters/Armstrong,Characters/Coupe,Characters/Shroud_58847 | Franchises= | Friends=Characters/Blonde_Blazer,Characters/Chase_58771,Characters/Coupe,Characters/Golem_58781,Characters/Invisigal,Characters/Prism,Characters/Robert_Robertson_III | Games=Games/Dispatch | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3821246-dossier_waterboy.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3821246-dossier_waterboy.png","path":"77\/776653\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_super,square_medium,square_tiny,scale_medium,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A timid and socially awkward would-be Superhero whose power is spitting out torrents of water. Works at the Superhero Dispatch Network as a janitor, but can be allowed to join the Z-Team.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Yang | Guid=3005-3112 | Deck=Known as The Wind Gust Dragon, Yang is one of the series of new characters to appear in the Street Fighter III. He is also featured in Super Street Fighter IV along with his brother Yun. | Gender=Male | Birthday=1981-12-12 | Concepts=Concepts/Command_Grab,Concepts/Divekick,Concepts/False_Death,Concepts/Martial_Arts,Concepts/Rekka_Character | Enemies=Characters/Gill,Characters/Sean_3103 | Franchises=Franchises/Capcom_Versus,Franchises/SNK_vs_Capcom,Franchises/Street_Fighter,Franchises/Street_Fighter_Alpha,Franchises/Street_Fighter_III,Franchises/Tekken | Friends=Characters/Chun_Li,Characters/Fei_Long,Characters/Gen,Characters/Jamie_48715,Characters/Lee,Characters/Yun | Games=Games/Capcom_Fighting_Collection_2,Games/Capcom_Fighting_Evolution,Games/Capcom_vs_SNK_2_Mark_of_the_Millennium,Games/Street_Fighter_30th_Anniversary_Collection,Games/Street_Fighter_6,Games/Street_Fighter_Alpha_3,Games/Street_Fighter_Alpha_3_MAX,Games/Street_Fighter_Duel,Games/Street_Fighter_III_2nd_Impact,Games/Street_Fighter_III_3rd_Strike,Games/Street_Fighter_III_Double_Impact,Games/Street_Fighter_III_New_Generation,Games/Street_Fighter_IV_Volt,Games/Super_Street_Fighter_IV_Pachislot_Edition,Games/Ultra_Street_Fighter_IV | Locations=Locations/Hong_Kong | People=People/Hideki_Okugawa,People/Tessho_Genda,People/Wataru_Takagi | Objects=Objects/Inline_Skates,Objects/Qipao | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/11/115901/1650193-7809bdbdfe98ddba3c91e50fadc2d055.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"1650193-7809bdbdfe98ddba3c91e50fadc2d055.jpg","path":"11\/115901\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,scale_small,square_small,square_tiny,square_medium,square_mini,scale_medium,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,scale_tiny,scale_super,screen_kubrick","caption":""},"background":[]}' />
==Overview== Yang is a Chinese martial artist in the [[Franchises/Street_Fighter|Street Fighter series]]. First appearing in [[Games/Street_Fighter_III_New_Generation|Street Fighter III: New Generation]], [[Characters/Yun|Yun]] and his older twin brother Yun are one of the many characters originally intended to replace the regular Street Fighter cast. Originally, Yang served as a palette swap to Yun but would later become a unique character after subsequent [[Franchises/Street_Fighter_III|Street Fighter III]] games
{{GBFigure|src=http://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_medium/10/100729/1530750-twins2.jpg|full=http://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/10/100729/1530750-twins2.jpg|align=right|caption=Yun fighting Ryu with the Ultra Combo the "Tenshin Senkyuutai" in Super Street Fighter IV.}} Both Yang and Yun are relatives of original [[Games/Street_Fighter|Street Fighter]] combatant Lee and are generally referred to as "The Lee Brothers" in their home town in Hong Kong. Yun and Yang practice Chinese Kenpo but differentiate themselves with their own unique set of moves.
While Yun is older, Yang acts as the more mature and serious of the twins. Yang has spiked quiff hair and wears similar clothing to Yun (kung-fu shirt, baggy pants, and sneakers). While Yun enjoys [[Objects/Skateboard|skateboarding,]] Yang [[Objects/Inline_Skates|inline skates]].
==Story== Both brothers Yun and Yang were orphaned when young but would be adopted by a grandfather while being supervised by Hong Kong's underground crime bosses serving as step-uncles. Their adoptive grandfather taught the brothers martial arts while having them help him in his resturant. They would later gain reputation for being well known in their home area in Hong Kong.
===[[Games/Street_Fighter_Alpha_3|Street Fighter Alpha 3]]=== Yun and Yang's involvement in Street Fighter Alpha 3 are non-canonical and Yang acts as a special assist to Yun. Both brothers hear rumors of their favorite martial arts movie star [[Characters/Fei_Long|Fei Long]] has been dealing drugs. Yun and Yang get to the bottom of the situation and eventually stumble to Fei Long's friend [[Characters/Dee_Jay|Dee Jay]] who reveal a possible location Fei Long is dealing at. Yun and Yang discover Fei Long and fight him to reveal the reasons behind the drug dealing. Defeated, Fei Long tells the brothers that he is trying to see if the drugs are related to [[Concepts/Shadaloo|Shadaloo]] which would later turn out true.
Hong Kong would be under the threat of [[Characters/M_Bison|M. Bison's]] organization and Fei Long, Yun, and Yang attempt to stop the dictator once and for all. Successful, Bison dies from the trio's hands. Grateful for their help, Fei Long asks Yun and Yang to help star in the latest Hong Kong fighting film "Street King II: Three Dragons." The film becomes successful with Yun and Yang enjoying their stardom.
===[[Games/Super_Street_Fighter_IV|Super Street Fighter IV]]===
{{GBFigure|src=http://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_medium/2/29889/950772-yang_capstyle_cool.jpg|full=http://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/2/29889/950772-yang_capstyle_cool.jpg|align=left|caption=Yang and his girlfriend Shomei.}} Yun and Yang would be two of the featured characters in the "Arcade Edition" build in Super Street Fighter IV. Both brothers appear in a introduction cinematic for [[Characters/Chun_Li|Chun-Li]].
Yun and Yang hears about the [[Concepts/S_I_N_Corporation|S.I.N.]] tournament and participate to help examine their skills with no one from Hong Kong knowing. After the tournament, Yun and Yang returned to Hong Kong realizing that they will be in trouble for their absence. Later on, while working, Yun and Yang would see Chun-Li leaving after paying her respects to Lee. Yun and Yang hope to see Chun-Li once again in the future.
===Street Fighter III=== Yun and Yang would participate in the third World Warriors tournament after Hong Kong becomes threatened by tournament leader [[Characters/Gill|Gill]]. Both brothers confront Gill and defeat him. Impressed, Gill offers the brothers ownership of Hong Kong as part of his plan for world domination. They turn him down leaving them temporarily troubled. Returning to Hong Kong, Yun and Yang receive hits from Yun's angered girlfriend Hoimei. Stressed out, Yang is cheered up by Hoimei's sister Shomei.
==Gameplay== Yang was originally a palette swap to Yun in Street Fighter III: New Generation. Yang had the same exact moves from Yun but following games would differentiate Yang with his own set until finalized in [[Games/Street_Fighter_III_3rd_Strike|Street Fighter III: 3rd Strike]]. Yang is a quick character like which encourages use of his quick poke attacks. Like Yun, Yang has low attack power and vitality so it forces quick thinking.
===Special moves===
{{GBFigure|src=http://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_medium/10/100729/1530752-twins4.jpg|full=http://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/10/100729/1530752-twins4.jpg|align=right|caption=Yang landing the final strike of the "Torou Zan."}} Different from Yun, Yang has a special move that can be comparable to Fei Long. The "Torou Zan" performs almost exactly as Fei Long's "Rekka Ken" but Yang does slash motions and knocks down an enemy on the final strike. Depending on kick buttons, the "Senkyuutai" has Yun perform a ground to air kick to send an opponent flying and can help dodge projectiles. Yang can perform a dash teleport called the "Kaihou" can confuse enemies. Like Yun, Yang can perform the palm defense "Byakko Soushoda" and can set up combos by transferring positions with the "Zenpou Tenshin."
===Super moves/Ultra moves=== The "Raishin Mahhaken" is a powerful attack with Yang performing a deadly single strike across the screen. In [[Games/Capcom_vs_SNK_2_Mark_of_the_Millennium|Capcom vs. SNK 2: Mark of the Millennium]], one of Yun's super moves has Yang assisting with his Raishin Mahhaken. In Super Street Fighter IV, Yang has his Raishin Mahhaken performs multiple strikes. The "Tenshin Senkyuutai" has Yang performing the Senkyuutai and then immediately landing more hits in the air. The "Seiei Enbu" can be comparable to Yun's "Genei Jin" but Yang's variant doesn't focus on speed but has shadows mimics his attacks increasing attack power when moves land.
==Yang's Win Quotes== " Where my potential will take me, no one knows. "
" Go home and watch more match videos. Leave the actual fighting to the pros! "
" Is that all you have? You'll need more if you wish to defeat me. "
" Keep your cool in battle next time. It'll do you wonders. "
" Talent or brainpower? You need both to win in this world. "
" That ought to put you out of commission for a while. "
" Don't assume similar tactics you have used on others will work on me. "
" I understand not being able to keep up, but that was faster than I anticipated. "
" Why don't you try using your head for once? "
" Every wound you have is punishment for your careless training. "
" I guess I just wanted victory more than you. "

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Character |Guid=bdce8d37-39e4-49ab-8813-96e55540f2e8 |Name=Yar the Housefly |Image=Yar from Yar's Revenge.png |Deck=From the best Atari 2600 game: Yar's Revenge. |RealName=Yar |Games=Games/Yars Revenge 14821, Games/Yars Return }} From the best Atari 2600 game: Yar's Revenge."

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Ying | Guid=3005-39455 | Deck=A policewoman who mostly focused on VIP and witness protection, later studied counter-terror tactics in Tel Aviv and then joined the SDU. Her Candela charges can stick to walls or roll along floors and cover a room in flashbangs, blinding everyone but herself for several seconds. | RealName=Siu Mei Lin | Gender=Non-Binary | Birthday=1983-05-12 | Concepts= | Enemies= | Franchises= | Friends=Characters/Lesion | Games=Games/Tom_Clancys_Rainbow_Six_Siege | Locations=Locations/Hong_Kong | People= | Objects=Objects/Flashbang | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/2/24786/3076747-9207355144-368 }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3076747-9207355144-368","path":"2\/24786\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,scale_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A policewoman who mostly focused on VIP and witness protection, later studied counter-terror tactics in Tel Aviv and then joined the SDU. Her Candela charges can stick to walls or roll along floors and cover a room in flashbangs, blinding everyone but herself for several seconds.

revision.text:
{{Character | Name=Zeus | Guid=3005-1101 | Deck=The King of the Gods in Greek mythology, Zeus is the master of the sky. His brothers Poseidon and Hades rule the sea and the underworld, respectively. | RealName=Zeus | Gender=Male | Concepts=Concepts/Adultery,Concepts/Apocalypse,Concepts/Bad_Parents,Concepts/Bangsian_Fantasy,Concepts/Catch_Phrase,Concepts/Characters_Without_Pupils,Concepts/Deicide,Concepts/Demiurge,Concepts/Downloadable_Content,Concepts/Giant_Killing,Concepts/Gift_of_the_Gods,Concepts/God,Concepts/God_Complex,Concepts/Greek_Mythology,Concepts/Incest,Concepts/Lightning_Manipulation,Concepts/Mentor,Concepts/Mythology,Concepts/Pegasus,Concepts/Pervert,Concepts/Rape,Concepts/Religion,Concepts/Revealing_Attire,Concepts/Revenge,Concepts/Transforming_Boss,Concepts/Unbeatable_Boss,Concepts/Villain,Concepts/Voice_Acting | Enemies=Characters/Ares,Characters/Asteria,Characters/Atlas_1328,Characters/Cronos,Characters/Deimos,Characters/Gaia,Characters/Hades,Characters/Kratos,Characters/Neff,Characters/Pandora_14625,Characters/Prometheus,Characters/Typhon_21663 | Franchises=Franchises/Age_of_Empires,Franchises/Age_of_Mythology,Franchises/Altered_Beast,Franchises/Devil_Children,Franchises/Digital_Devil_Monogatari,Franchises/Disney,Franchises/God_of_War,Franchises/Kid_Icarus,Franchises/Majin_Tensei,Franchises/Megami_Tensei,Franchises/Shanghai,Franchises/The_Settlers | Friends=Characters/Ajax_5636,Characters/Apollo,Characters/Aquagirl,Characters/Ares,Characters/Ares_28589,Characters/Artemis,Characters/Athena,Characters/Callisto_23362,Characters/Dionysus,Characters/Fenyx,Characters/Hades,Characters/Hecatoncheires,Characters/Helios,Characters/Hephaestus,Characters/Hercules,Characters/Hermes,Characters/Iris_23476,Characters/Jason_Greek,Characters/King_Minos_30556,Characters/Palutena,Characters/Perun,Characters/Pit,Characters/Poseidon,Characters/Talos,Characters/Theseus,Characters/Wonder_Woman | Games=Games/Age_of_Empires_Mythologies,Games/Age_of_Mythology,Games/Age_of_Mythology_The_Titans,Games/Altered_Beast,Games/Altered_Beast_Guardian_of_the_Realms,Games/Anthropomachy,Games/Apotheon,Games/Cavequest,Games/Clash_of_the_Titans,Games/Classic_Collection,Games/DC_Universe_Online,Games/Disney_Sorcerers_Arena,Games/Disneys_Hercules_Action_Game,Games/Dragon_Poker,Games/Fight_of_Gods,Games/Full_Bokko_Heroes_X,Games/God_of_War,Games/God_of_War_Ascension,Games/God_of_War_Chains_of_Olympus,Games/God_of_War_Collection,Games/God_of_War_Ghost_of_Sparta,Games/God_of_War_II,Games/God_of_War_III,Games/God_of_War_Origins_Collection,Games/God_of_War_Saga,Games/Gods_of_Rome,Games/Gods_Rush,Games/Grepolis,Games/Hades_2020,Games/Hades_II,Games/Hercules_The_Legendary_Journeys,Games/Heroes_Evolved,Games/Immortals_Fenyx_Rising,Games/Injustice_Gods_Among_Us,Games/Injustice_Gods_Among_Us_2013,Games/Kid_Icarus,Games/Kid_Icarus_Of_Myths_and_Monsters,Games/Kingdom_Hearts_III,Games/Kyuuyaku_Megami_Tensei,Games/Marvel_War_of_Heroes,Games/Monster_Strike,Games/Mytheon,Games/Mythic_Heroes,Games/NES_Remix_2,Games/NES_Remix_Pack,Games/Odyssey_RPG,Games/Percy_Jackson_And_the_Olympians_The_Lightning_Thief,Games/Persona_Q_Shadow_of_the_Labyrinth,Games/Pinball_Pulse_The_Ancients_Beckon,Games/PlayStation_All_Stars_Battle_Royale,Games/Puzzle_And_Dragons,Games/Puzzle_And_Dragons_Nintendo_Switch_Edition,Games/Ronde,Games/Science_Kombat,Games/Scribblenauts_Mega_Pack,Games/Scribblenauts_Unlimited,Games/Scribblenauts_Unmasked_A_DC_Comics_Adventure,Games/Sega_Archives_from_U_S_A_vol_1,Games/Sega_Classics,Games/Sega_Genesis_Classics,Games/Shin_Megami_Tensei_Devil_Children_Black_Book_Red_Book,Games/Shin_Megami_Tensei_Strange_Journey_Redux,Games/Smite,Games/Smite_2,Games/Soul_Hackers_2,Games/Super_Shanghai_Dragons_Eye,Games/The_Battle_of_Olympus,Games/The_Settlers_III,Games/Titan_Quest,Games/Warriors_Orochi_4,Games/Warriors_Orochi_4_Ultimate,Games/Will_Rock,Games/Wishbone_and_the_Amazing_Odyssey,Games/Zeus_Master_of_Olympus,Games/Zeus_Official_Expansion_Poseidon | Locations=Locations/Ancient_Greece,Locations/Arena,Locations/Greece,Locations/Olympus,Locations/Solana_Galaxy,Locations/Sparta,Locations/Sun,Locations/Tartarus | People=People/Corey_Burton,People/Marc_Graue,People/Paul_Eiding,People/Rip_Torn,People/SungWon_Cho | Objects=Objects/Lightning,Objects/Lightning_Bolt,Objects/The_Blade_of_Olympus,Objects/The_Gauntlet_of_Zeus | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3802786-0084920140-1200.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3802786-0084920140-1200.png","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,scale_small,square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_medium,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,scale_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' />
==Overview== Zeus, a god of the ancient Greek pantheon, is the son of [[Concepts/Titan|titans]]; his father, Cronus, attempted to eat Zeus once he was born, but his mother Rhea saved him by pulling him from Cronus's maw. It is then said that Zeus was raised by [[Concepts/Nymphs|nymphs]] on the island of Samos until he reached maturity. When he had grown, with the help of his mother and siblings, Zeus overthrew and castrated his father. He then assumed Cronus's position as king of the immortals, just as Cronus had once done to his own father, Ouranos.
Zeus is married to Hera, goddess of women and marriage. He also has many children, both god and demigod. Among his progeny are [[Characters/Ares|Ares]], [[Characters/Athena|Athena]], [[Characters/Apollo|Apollo]], Artemis, [[Characters/Aphrodite_14622|Aphrodite]], [[Characters/Dionysus|Dionysus]], Hebe, [[Characters/Hermes_7188|Hermes]], Heracles, Helen, [[Characters/Hephaestus|Hephaestus]], [[Characters/Perseus|Perseus]] and Minos.
Other than the battle for Olympus between the divinities, most of the surviving tales about Zeus concern his interactions with mortals. More specifically, Zeus a number of tales related to Zeus refer to his pursuits of mortal women with whom to sow his seed. He is also known for casting spontaneous, generally harsh judgements upon mortals and immortals alike. He banishes men and punishes gods furiously when he is disobeyed.
In Roman [[Concepts/Mythology|mythology]], which borrows liberally from the Greek pantheon, Zeus became Jove or Jupiter. By the time Christianity arose in Rome, the bearded image of Zeus had become the de facto characterization of God, and remains so to this day.
==In God of War== In the God of War series, Zeus is the father of [[Characters/Kratos|Kratos]]. He has the power to shapeshift into forms such as an eagle and grow to the size of a giant He also possesses control over the weather, particularly thunder and lightning. But, like all gods, he is vulnerable to the [[Objects/The_Blade_of_Olympus|Blade of Olympus]], his own powerful weapon. In battle, he is capable of moving at immense supernatural speed and creating powerful barriers to shield himself. He also had an attack which creates an electrical silhouette of himself. After draining power from [[Characters/Gaia|Gaia]], Zeus also gains the ability to make full clones of himself that, although not nearly as powerful as the original, could still put up a fight.
{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/88/887274/3354487-maxresdefault.jpg|align=right|width=480|caption=Zeus in God of War}} When Zeus unleashes the full wrath of his power, Kratos is unable to overpower him even though he had used the Blade of Olympus to weaken him beforehand. In [[Games/God_of_War_III|God of War III]], after Kratos stabs Zeus through Gaia's heart, Zeus's spirit fights Kratos and overpowers him; he disarms Kratos of all of his weapons and equipment, and then infects the Spartan with fear itself. Zeus takes Kratos to the brink of death until [[Characters/Pandora_14625|Pandora]] helps Kratos unleash the power of Hope. This power causes Zeus to become vulnerable Zeus, and with the tables turned, Kratos beats him to death with his bare hands.
==In Kid Icarus==
{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/0/6228/2164263-zeus_kid_icarus.png|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/0/6228/2164263-zeus_kid_icarus.png|align=right|width=179|caption=Zeus's design in the Kid Icarus series.}} Zeus is a minor figure in the [[Franchises/Kid_Icarus|Kid Icarus series]]. Though unnamed in the original [[Games/Kid_Icarus|Kid Icarus]], he is revealed to be Zeus in [[Games/Kid_Icarus_Of_Myths_and_Monsters|Kid Icarus: Of Myths and Monsters]]. Zeus tests [[Characters/Pit|Pit]], and the rewards for passing his tests include receiving gifts, increased strength, or an increased health bar. He does not otherwise play an important role in any game in the series to date, nor is it indicated that he is in any way the most powerful god in the universe's pantheon. His appearance is like that of a stereotypical, if elderly angel, with wings and a halo.
==Wonder Woman== Zeus allowed [[Characters/Wonder_Woman|Wonder Woman]] to be granted powers from the blessing of the Gods of Olympus. In DC comic new 52 Zeus is the father of [[Characters/Wonder_Woman|Wonder Woman]].
Zeus is the Father of [[Characters/Wonder_Girl|Wonder Girl]], making her a demigod like her brother [[Characters/Hercules|Hercules]].

{{Company | Name=100 Cozy Games | Guid=3010-26459 | Characters= | Concepts= | Developed_games= | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Published_games=Games/100_Christmas_Cats }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Company | Name= 100 Hidden Animals | Guid=3010-26457 | Characters= | Concepts= | Developed_games=Games/100_Christmas_Cats | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Published_games= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />
